plugins.name: ui-clone-skills
plugins.description: Point at any live website URL. Get production-ready React + Tailwind components that match the original — styles, animations, and responsive behavior. Downloads the actual CSS, greps JS bundles for GSAP/Framer Motion/Lenis params, and extracts Webflow IX2 timelines. Automated visual diff verification (AE/SSIM) without spending screenshot tokens. Anti-skip gates enforce extraction before code generation. 3 skills, automated pipeline.
